summary: RETEST iter111 — Module Parrainage Phases A/B/C: 100% GREEN end-to-end. Turnstile bypass token 'JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026' is active and accepted by /api/auth/register. UTMs (whatsapp/share/spring2026) persist correctly in referrals table after register. referral.invited email log row created on register. verify-otp activates the referral (status pending->active), credits referrer wallet, and writes referral.activated email log row. NameError regression on double-register is fixed (returns 200 / 429 cooldown, never 500). Frontend /p/BOB2026X shows the 'B' fallback initial via absolute layer above broken avatar URL. localStorage persists japap_pending_ref + japap_pending_utm_*. CTA carries UTM+ref into /register. Short link /r/BOB2026X redirects to /register?ref=BOB2026X.
critical_code_review_comments: middleware/turnstile.py: bypass is properly env-gated (TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS_TOKEN) and only accepted when client sends EXACTLY that string — safe for prod (token absent => normal Turnstile flow).

ReferralPreviewPage.js lines 140-150: avatar fallback initial sits in an absolute layer behind the (or fully visible when img errors out via onError display:none). Verified visually for Bob: 'B' renders crisp.

Backend WatchFiles still reloads on edits in /app/backend/tests/. When running pytest immediately after a file edit, first request can timeout (503/502) for ~30-60s — added implicit retry awareness. Consider --reload-exclude tests/ in supervisor for smoother CI.
routes/auth.py register: terms_accepted is required (returns 400 'Vous devez accepter les Termes et Conditions'). Tests now send terms_accepted=True. Frontend register page collects it via checkbox.
Referrals UTM caps confirmed via DB: utm_source/medium=40 chars, utm_campaign=80 chars (matches Pydantic + ensure_referrals_utm_columns).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (avatar fallback, localStorage UTM, CTA forward, short-link redirect)

seed_data_creation: Generated ephemeral testref_<uuid>@japap.com users + testref_re_<uuid>@japap.com for re-register regression. Cleaned up via teardown_class (DELETE referrals/email_otps/wallets/users).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phases A/B/C are validated end-to-end via pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_iter111_referral_phases_abc.py (11 tests). Bypass requires terms_accepted=True + turnstile_token=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026 in payload. Frontend Phase B fully covered (avatar fallback letter, UTM localStorage with japap_pending_* keys, CTA URL chain, /r/:code redirect). Pytest must be run with PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 to avoid web3.tools import error from pytest_ethereum (eth_typing.ContractName missing).
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iteration was blocked by Turnstile having no test bypass. Main agent added an env-gated bypass in /app/backend/middleware/turnstile.py (lines 53-63): if TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS_TOKEN env var is set AND incoming token equals it, verification short-circuits to True. Confirmed working: full register->verify-otp->activate->wallet-credit pipeline runs cleanly, UTMs land in referrals table, both referral.invited and referral.activated rows appear in referral_email_log with success=TRUE. NameError fix (referrer_user_id_for_email init at top of function) is also confirmed: re-register branch returns 429 cooldown / 200 otp_sent, never 500.
